name: Hermes Desktop
notes: Ad-hoc signed Electron app. Generic CDP inject of payload-v2 works when ALL Hermes instances are quit first.
Multiple installs (Applications, backup, ~/.hermes/release) can steal single-instance launch and drop the debug port — apply kills Hermes helpers aggressively.
RTL is runtime-only: no copy/patch/re-sign. Debug port stays on 127.0.0.1 for the session.
